claims.text: Subject 16 (female, age 23 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on Allele 1 with combined pseudodeficiency alleles c.1726G>A/c.2065G>A on Allele 2; NBS1=2.02, NBS2=1.07, GAA=2.3, Hex4=5, CK=108, AST=103, ALT=40; classified as Carrier.

citations.quote: 16 | F | 23 | 2.02 | 1.07 | c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) | combined pseudodef alleles c.1726G>A(p.Gly576Ser)/c.2065G>A(p.Glu689Lys) | 2.3 | 5 | 108 | 103 | 40 | | | Carrier

claims.text: Subject 38 (male, age 21 days at initial consult) carries c.1935C>A (p.Asp645Glu) on Allele 1 with c.2065G>A (p.Glu689Lys) on Allele 2; NBS1=1.1, NBS2=1.08, GAA=3.2, Hex4=3.3, CK=69, AST=93, ALT=32; classified as Carrier.
Carriers (including those carrying c.1935C>A) have approximately 50% of normal enzyme activity and to the authors' knowledge there are no reports of affected carriers.

citations.quote: Carriers have about 50% of the average normal enzyme activity [6]; to our knowledge, there are no reports of affected carriers.
